item.title: Wellcome to 8684 Of Gate
item.description:
[Home ](https://georgeorwell8684.github.io/8684ofgate/)
|烧录工具 | [Rufus](https://rufus.ie/en/#download)| [balenaEtcher](https://sourceforge.net/projects/etcher.mirror/files/v2.1.4/) | [UNetbootin](https://sourceforge.net/projects/unetbootin/files/UNetbootin/702/) | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | 主引导盘 | [Ventoy ](https://sourceforge.net/projects/ventoy/files/v1.1.11/ventoy-1.1.11-livecd.iso/download) | --- | --- | | PE工具盘 | [win-pe-11](https://archive.org/download/win-pe-11-10-8-sergei-strelec-x-86-x-64-2023.06.25-english_202310/win-pe-11-10-8-sergei-strelec-x-86-x-64-2023.06.25-english_202310_archive.torrent) | [Hiren’s BootCD PE](https://www.hirensbootcd.org/files/HBCD_PE_x64.iso) | --- | | --- | --- | --- | --- |
W series： 。
